context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified the Document Verification + Rights/Risks Guidance Layer: (1) GET /api/catalog/{id}/compliance endpoint returns rights, obligations, risks with has_guidance=true for F24_PREPARATION, VAT_OPEN_PF, INCOME_TAX_PF. (2) Workspace endpoint includes practice_type field resolved via LEGACY_MAP (vat_registration -> VAT_OPEN_PF). (3) CreatePracticePage search now matches on practice_id and user_explanation fields. (4) PracticeDetailPage shows 'Tutela e conformita' expandable card with rights (green), obligations (blue), risks (amber), what-if-missed (teal), and disclaimer sections. (5) DocumentVaultPage shows privacy manifesto 'La tua privacy, il nostro motore' with AES-256/GDPR/UE badges. (6) Document section in PracticeDetailPage shows 'Solo AI' badge and data sovereignty badges when documents exist. Fixed: compliance_data.py had DICHIARAZIONE_REDDITI_PF but catalog uses INCOME_TAX_PF - updated to match.
